assertions.title: Nova Act provider exists and is selected for live mode

steps.expected: Registry imports and returns NovaActAuditProvider for live mode
steps.observed: Line 'from app.providers.nova_act_browser import NovaActAuditProvider, NOVA_ACT_AVAILABLE' present. get_browser_provider() returns NovaActAuditProvider(storage) when effective_mode == 'live' and NOVA_ACT_AVAILABLE is true.

assertions.title: Backend tests pass for Nova Act provider

steps.action: Verify test files exist: tests/test_nova_act_provider.py, tests/test_taxonomy.py
steps.expected: Both test files exist in backend/tests/
steps.observed: test_nova_act_provider.py (36032 bytes) and test_taxonomy.py (13126 bytes) both exist

steps.expected: All tests pass including nova act provider and taxonomy tests
steps.observed: 151 tests passed in 5.22s. test_nova_act_provider.py: 25 tests passed (instantiation, 6 scenarios, full audit run, error handling, taxonomy integration, screenshots, parallel persona, evidence payload, validation contract assertions). test_taxonomy.py: 46 tests passed (categories, scenarios, personas, severity, regulatory mappings, scenario-category mapping, pattern family compat, evidence types, confidence thresholds, type exports, no hardcoded values).

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-NOVA-001 confirmed /api/readiness returns browser_provider='NovaActAuditProvider' and provider_registry.py correctly selects NovaActAuditProvider for live mode. VAL-NOVA-013 confirmed all 151 backend tests pass including 25 nova act provider tests and 46 taxonomy tests.
